caribbean.headline: Barbados Faces Strong Winds Heavy Rain Today
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing sustained winds up to 22 knots with wave heights reaching 6.9 feet from the east and a maximum rain probability of 80 percent. St. Lucia reports slightly lighter winds near 19 knots as this moist tropical disturbance impacts the Lesser Antilles region.

mediterranean.headline: High Waves and Rain Impact Haifa Port Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing elevated wave heights reaching 11 feet with west-dominant swells at an 8-second period, accompanied by moderate winds up to 17 knots and a high 80 percent chance of rain. Mykonos is also seeing increased winds near 22 knots, contributing to unsettled conditions across the eastern Mediterranean.
